name: kuradb
description: FiveM PostgreSQL wrapper and ORM foundation for Project Kura
author: Walteria.net

scripts.build: bun run build:manifest && bun run build:server && bun run build:cli && bun run build:lib
scripts.lint: biome check biome.json build.js cli.js package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.lib.json README.md src lib/KuraDB.ts lib/orm.ts
scripts.precommit: bun run lint && bun run check
scripts.format: biome format --write biome.json build.js cli.js package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.lib.json README.md src lib/KuraDB.ts lib/orm.ts
